creator: exploringlondon
caption:
London has a brand new rooftop with stunning views across East London and it’s completely free to visit. No pre-booking required, just walk up to the 3rd floor of the brand new @vam_east museum in @queenelizabetholympicpark Stratford. You’ll get incredible views of the area, and spot the iconic London skyline too!

The museum is now open, part of the East Bank which has received more than £600m in investment from City Hall @mayorofldn ✨

🎟️ Free entry
🗓️ Open daily, 10am-6pm, Thurs and Sat open later until 10pm
📍 3rd Floor roof terrace, V&A East Museum, 107 Carpenters Rd, Stratford Cross, E20 2AR
